title: 王子様の優雅なる休日

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Aaand done! Another productive day finished!
Now it's time to get changed, take a bath, and
take a princess dive into bed.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, wait! I have to read that romance manga I
borrowed from Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Um... I believe she said it was a story with a prince
in it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Let's see here... Oh, wow!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This prince has got style! He's using all these
princely moves I've never seen before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One Sunday, I'm taking a stroll through town
when...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo! I'm late! I'M LAAATE!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah! WATCH OUT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I barely dodge Kawakami Princess as she charges
past me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That's weird. This is different to how I
imagined it in my head...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You were supposed to catch me in your embrace,
and then we'd begin waltzing while you asked,
"Are you all right, my dear?"
choice_data_list: What on earth are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, to tell you the truth, last night, I had an
unexpected culture shock!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I always imagined a prince to be exactly like
Legendary Trainer from Princess Fighter, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The prince I read about yesterday also had the
strength to effortlessly carry a princess in his
arms!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So of course, it's only natural that a prince should
be strong enough to lift a truck or two, right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
He also had the speed to always arrive in time to
save the princess from danger! I never knew
princes had leg strength on par with Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be wildly misinterpreting something
with this new information she's learned about
princes.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd love it so much if you'd show me your princely
moves, Trainer! Please!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but princes can do lots of moves, right?
Which would be best for you to demonstrate?
choice_data_list:
How about a mental test rather than something
physical?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hmm... In that case, um...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I've got it! Trainer, as I walk by, I want you to
pin me to the wall with an assertive SLAM!
choice_data_list: I guess I could do that...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Right, it might be a little dangerous to do it
here, so let's go elsewhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What part of this is supposed to be dangerous?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here we go, Trainer! Show me your best
princely Wall Buster!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's a passionate battle between the prince
and the princess! The one who pins the other
against the wall is the victor!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You attempt to corner me with all the force you
can muster, and I'll evade you with everything I've
got!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this! If you won't bring the fight to me, I'll
bring it to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I end up terribly exhausted by the end, I
somehow manage to survive our wall-slamming
endeavors and return home in one piece.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Unconventional? Hmm, what to choose...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I want to try that one where the princess
takes the prince's hand, and they flee from a
group of pursuers!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The prince is trapped in a dire situation
when—bam! The princess appears to whisk him
away! With their trust in each other, the prince
and princess flee to safety!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, take my hand! I'll reel you in like I've gone
fishing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I get "fished up" by Kawakami Princess
over and over until she is finally satisfied with our
situational training.
